Runway vs Together AI

Compare Runway and Together AI: free credits, features, and ratings. Which one is right for you?

Together AI
Category
Video Generation

⭐ 3

null limited free tier

one-time
daily

Pay-as-you-go

Runway

Pioneer in AI video generation. Gen-3 Alpha model delivers excellent quality. 125 free credits monthly, enough for a few high-quality short clips. Popular among professional creators.

Pros

  • ✓Most comprehensive
  • ✓Best video editing
  • ✓Industry standard

Cons

  • ✗Only 125 one-time credits
  • ✗Credits don't refill
  • ✗Expensive

Key Features

Video GenerationVideo EditingGreen ScreenMotion TrackingStyle Transfer
View Details →

Together AI

Open-source model inference platform offering free inference for Meta-Llama and other popular open-source models. User-friendly interface, great for rapid prototyping.

Pros

  • ✓Rich open-source model selection
  • ✓Free credits on registration
  • ✓OpenAI-compatible API

Cons

  • ✗Unclear free tier limits
  • ✗Requires VPN from China
  • ✗Auto-charge when free credits exhausted

Key Features

Open-Source Model InferenceLlama Series SupportOpenAI-Compatible API
View Details →
